scripts.package: electron-vite build && npm run native-deps && electron-builder
scripts.package:mac: electron-vite build && npm run native-deps && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:win: electron-vite build && npm run native-deps && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:linux: electron-vite build && npm run native-deps && electron-builder --linux
scripts.release:mac: electron-vite build && npm run native-deps && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.release:win: electron-vite build && npm run native-deps && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.release:linux: electron-vite build && npm run native-deps && electron-builder --linux --publish always
